vocab.meaning: sa lầy về mặt hậu cần/di chuyển
vocab.example: Getting stuck in a logistical quagmire like a peak-hour jam is the perfect time for me to catch up on long-form journalism.

vocab.meaning: sự đắm chìm trong âm thanh
vocab.example: I opt for auditory immersion by listening to high-fidelity classical music to block out the honking around me.

vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường và lòng nhẫn nại
vocab.example: Being trapped in a car for hours really demands a great deal of fortitude and forbearance to avoid a mental breakdown.

vocab.meaning: sự nghỉ ngơi về mặt nhận thức/trí não
vocab.example: Instead of scrolling through my phone, I use the standstill as a cognitive respite to simply observe the city's architecture.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế sự bực dọc/phát cáu
vocab.example: I try my best to stifle my exasperation by focusing on deep breathing exercises until the vehicles start moving again.

vocab.meaning: sự bồi bổ về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: I find traffic jams to be an unlikely opportunity for intellectual nourishment through educational audiobooks.

vocab.meaning: không bị ảnh hưởng bởi sự hỗn loạn xung quanh
vocab.example: By closing all the windows and turning on the AC, I remain impervious to the pandemonium of the bustling street.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng tê liệt giao thông đối với người đi làm
vocab.example: During periods of commuter paralysis, I often reflect on my daily goals to ensure the time isn't completely wasted.

vocab.meaning: sự chấp nhận một cách bình thản/khắc kỷ
vocab.example: I’ve developed a sense of stoic acceptance toward traffic, realizing that getting angry won't make the cars move any faster.

vocab.meaning: sự quan sát gián tiếp/tò mò về người khác
vocab.example: I indulge in a bit of vicarious observation, watching the reactions of other drivers to see how they handle the delay.
